data.title: SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge Sets New Interest Rate for Green Bond
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge ( (SPXXF) ) is now available.

SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge has announced a new interest rate of 5.61% for its green subordinated senior open bond for the period from February 24, 2025, to May 22, 2025. This determination aligns with the terms of the Bond Agreement and has been communicated to the Norwegian Central Securities Depository, indicating the company’s ongoing commitment to structured financial management and transparency in its green financing efforts, potentially impacting stakeholders and market operations positively.

More about SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge

SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing banking products and services to customers in the Nordic region. The company is known for offering a range of financial solutions including loans, savings, and investment products, with a particular focus on sustainability and green financing initiatives.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.17B

data.title: Bloomin’ Brands Announces Workforce Reduction in Tampa
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Bloomin’ Brands ( (BLMN) ) has issued an announcement.

On February 20, 2025, Bloomin’ Brands announced a workforce reduction at its Tampa, Florida Restaurant Support Center, affecting approximately 100 employees or 17% of the team. This restructuring follows strategic changes, including the re-franchising of its Brazil operations in December 2024, and aims to align costs with business size and focus on growth. The company anticipates incurring $7.5 million in pre-tax costs due to severance but expects annual savings of $22 million. Executive leadership changes were also announced to support the new operational model.

More about Bloomin’ Brands

Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. operates in the restaurant industry, specializing in casual dining. Its primary brands include Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba’s Italian Grill, and Bonefish Grill, with a focus on providing diverse dining experiences primarily in the United States.

YTD Price Performance: 2.01%

Average Trading Volume: 1,764,114

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.03B

data.title: Oxford BioMedica Announces Change in Major Holdings
data.description:

Oxford BioMedica ( (GB:OXB) ) just unveiled an update.

Oxford BioMedica PLC announced a change in major holdings, as Ameriprise Financial, Inc., a US-based company, has altered its voting rights in the company. The percentage of voting rights held by Ameriprise Financial decreased from 5.099% to 3.886%, signaling a shift in their investment strategy. This change may impact the company’s shareholder dynamics and influence future decisions, although the specific implications for stakeholders remain unspecified.

More about Oxford BioMedica

Oxford BioMedica PLC is a UK-based company operating in the biotechnology industry, specializing in the development and commercialization of gene and cell therapy products.

HMT Ltd. ( (IN:HMT) ) just unveiled an update.

HMT Limited disclosed that HMT (International) Limited, its wholly owned subsidiary, received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department for outstanding amounts from the assessment years 2010 and 2012. The company is consulting with tax advisors to address the situation and ensure compliance, which may affect its financial standing and stakeholder interests.

More about HMT Ltd.

HMT Limited is a company under the Government of India, operating primarily in the manufacturing sector. It has a wholly owned subsidiary, HMT (International) Limited, which plays a significant role in their operations.

data.title: Electra Battery Materials Unveils Promising Gold and Cobalt Exploration Results in Idaho
data.description:

Electra Battery Materials Corp ( (TSE:ELBM) ) has provided an update.

Electra Battery Materials Corporation has announced promising exploration results from its CAS Property in the Idaho Cobalt Belt, highlighting high-grade gold alongside cobalt and copper mineralization. With gold prices near all-time highs, the discovery enhances the economic potential of Electra’s holdings, providing strategic value and potential collaboration opportunities with gold-focused explorers. This development is significant for Electra’s strategy to expand its resource base in the U.S. and secure critical mineral supplies.

More about Electra Battery Materials Corp

Electra Battery Materials Corporation operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of critical minerals such as cobalt and copper. The company is primarily involved in securing a stable supply of these minerals, which are essential for industrial and military applications in the United States.

data.title: Glencore Cancels 100 Million Treasury Shares to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Glencore ( (GB:GLEN) ) has provided an update.

Glencore plc announced the cancellation of 100 million treasury shares, aligning with its policy to keep treasury shares under 10% of total issued share capital. This move reduces the total ordinary shares in treasury to approximately 9.29% of the company’s total issued share capital. This strategic decision reflects Glencore’s ongoing efforts to optimize its capital structure, potentially enhancing shareholder value and maintaining compliance with UK Listing Rules. The cancellation may influence Glencore’s market positioning by adjusting its financial metrics and demonstrating its commitment to disciplined capital management.

More about Glencore

Glencore is a leading global diversified natural resource company, involved in the production, processing, recycling, sourcing, marketing, and distribution of more than 60 commodities. The company operates through a broad network of assets, customers, and suppliers worldwide, supporting energy needs and decarbonization efforts. Glencore serves industrial consumers in sectors such as automotive, steel, power generation, battery manufacturing, and oil, while also offering financing and logistics services. With a workforce of over 150,000 in more than 30 countries, Glencore is committed to security and human rights principles and participates actively in global transparency initiatives.

YTD Price Performance: -7.24%

Average Trading Volume: 38,204,415

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Dun & Bradstreet Reports Q4 and Full Year 2024 Results
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Dun & Bradstreet Holdings ( (DNB) ) is now available.

Dun & Bradstreet Holdings reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 20, 2025. The company experienced a revenue increase of 0.2% for the fourth quarter and 2.9% for the entire year compared to 2023. Despite a slight decline in adjusted net income for the quarter, Dun & Bradstreet achieved 3% organic revenue growth for the year and expanded EBITDA margins by 30 basis points. The company also reduced its net leverage to 3.6 times, highlighting a focus on capital structure improvement. Moving into 2025, Dun & Bradstreet aims to expand its solution sets and support clients’ needs through data, analytics, and generative AI. The financial outcomes indicate a stable performance with slight growth, suggesting a positive outlook for stakeholders.

More about Dun & Bradstreet Holdings

Dun & Bradstreet is a leading global provider of business decisioning data and analytics, enabling companies to improve their business performance. Their Data Cloud offers solutions that help customers accelerate revenue, lower costs, mitigate risks, and transform businesses. With a history dating back to 1841, Dun & Bradstreet has been relied upon by companies of all sizes to manage risk and discover opportunities.

YTD Price Performance: -14.74%

Average Trading Volume: 2,926,287

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.69B

data.description:

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. ( (SG:BEZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. reported significant financial growth in FY2024, with a 41.3% increase in revenue to S$111.88 million and a 167.7% rise in net profit to S$21.19 million. The company’s strategic shift towards a service-oriented model and the exit of loss-making operations have improved its gross profit margin and strengthened its financial position, enabling a proposed dividend of 0.6 SG cents per share.

More about Beng Kuang Marine Ltd.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. operates within the offshore and marine industry, providing asset integrity solutions and services, particularly for floating assets such as FPSOs and FSOs. The company is focused on an asset-light and service-oriented business model.

data.title: SolarBank Partners with Viridi for Innovative Solar and Battery Project in Buffalo
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Solarbank Corp. ( (TSE:SUNN) ) has provided an update.

SolarBank Corporation has partnered with Viridi to develop a combined solar power and battery energy storage system in Buffalo, New York. This project, which will be built on a closed landfill site, aims to transform unusable land into a productive asset that generates clean energy for the community. By collaborating with Viridi, known for its innovative and safe battery technology, SolarBank intends to boost its market positioning in the renewable energy space. The project is subject to various approvals and financing but, once operational, will function as a community solar project offering financial savings to local homeowners and renters.

More about Solarbank Corp.

SolarBank Corporation is an independent renewable and clean energy project developer and owner focusing on distributed and community solar projects in Canada and the USA. The company develops solar, Battery Energy Storage System (BESS), and EV Charging projects that sell electricity to utilities, commercial, industrial, municipal, and residential off-takers. SolarBank maximizes returns through a diverse portfolio of projects across multiple leading North American markets.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell
